title: Fiddle
description: At the start of each turn, draw [blue]2[/blue] additional cards. You may not draw cards during your turn.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic adds 2 cards to the hand draw via ModifyHandDrawLate. The ShouldDraw method prevents card draws during the owner's active turn, allowing draws only at other times or when forced.
